llamacpp-flox-runtime.command:
set -euo pipefail

  SCRIPTS_DIR="$FLOX_ENV_PROJECT/scripts"

  # --- git metadata ---
  if command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && git -C "$FLOX_ENV_PROJECT" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    rev_count=$(git -C "$FLOX_ENV_PROJECT" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
    short_rev=$(git -C "$FLOX_ENV_PROJECT" rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
    full_rev=$(git -C "$FLOX_ENV_PROJECT" rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
    if git -C "$FLOX_ENV_PROJECT" diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null && git -C "$FLOX_ENV_PROJECT" diff --cached --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null; then
      dirty=false
      dirty_suffix=""
    else
      dirty=true
      dirty_suffix="-dirty"
    fi
    recent_log=$(git -C "$FLOX_ENV_PROJECT" log --oneline -10 2>/dev/null || echo "  (unavailable)")
  else
    rev_count="unknown"
    short_rev="unknown"
    full_rev="unknown"
    dirty="unknown"
    dirty_suffix=""
    recent_log="  (no git repository)"
  fi

  version="0.1.0+${rev_count}.${short_rev}${dirty_suffix}"

  # --- install scripts ---
  mkdir -p "$out/bin"
  for script in llamacpp-preflight llamacpp-resolve-model llamacpp-serve; do
    install -m 0755 "$SCRIPTS_DIR/$script" "$out/bin/$script"
  done

  # --- compute script metadata ---
  script_info=""
  for script in llamacpp-preflight llamacpp-resolve-model llamacpp-serve; do
    f="$out/bin/$script"
    sha=$(sha256sum "$f" | cut -d' ' -f1)
    bytes=$(wc -c < "$f")
    lines=$(wc -l < "$f")
    script_info="${script_info}$(printf '  %-24s sha256:%s  %s bytes  %s lines' "$script" "$sha" "$bytes" "$lines")
"
  done

  # --- write BUILD_INFO ---
  mkdir -p "$out/share/llamacpp-flox-runtime"
  cat > "$out/share/llamacpp-flox-runtime/BUILD_INFO" <<EOF
llamacpp-flox-runtime ${version}
built: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)

git:
  rev:       ${full_rev}
  short_rev: ${short_rev}
  rev_count: ${rev_count}
  dirty:     ${dirty}

scripts:
$(printf '%b' "$script_info")

recent changes:
$(echo "$recent_log" | sed 's/^/  /')
EOF
llamacpp-flox-runtime.description: Runtime scripts for llama.cpp model serving with Flox
